outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Video purportedly shows Iranian soldiers seizing ships in Strait of Hormuz — S&P 500 above 7,000
outlets.summary: CNN leads with IRGC ship seizure video, markets hitting records despite war, and analysis of Trump's contradictory Iran statements. Also covers Lebanon-Israel Round 2 talks.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Lebanon and Israel resume rare direct talks as Israel demolishes homes in occupied south
outlets.summary: WaPo leads with Lebanon-Israel Washington talks and Israeli home demolitions in occupied southern Lebanon. Beit Lif 'almost entirely flattened.' Iran seizes ships, opinion piece: both sides want peace but won't act like it.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Iran agrees not to execute eight women after Trump's public appeal — Senate GOP blocks war powers vote
outlets.summary: Fox leads with Trump claiming credit for saving 8 women from execution (Iran denies). Also covers Senate blocking 5th war powers vote and ceasefire extension. Frames Trump as achieving results through pressure.

outlets.name: RedState
outlets.headline: Iran War pushes gas past $4 — US still paying far less than most countries
outlets.summary: Coverage framing US gas prices as painful but noting Americans pay less than European allies hit harder by the Hormuz blockade.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war: What's happening on day 55 after Trump extended ceasefire?
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera Day 55 liveblog: IRGC releases ship seizure video. Lebanon says no talks without Israeli withdrawal. Israel kills journalist in Lebanon. Comprehensive coverage of Washington talks.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Trump extends U.S. ceasefire with Iran at Pakistan's request
outlets.summary: NPR reports on Trump's indefinite ceasefire extension made at the request of Pakistan's PM Sharif and Army Chief Munir.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Iran seizes pair of container ships — first since start of war with US and Israel
outlets.summary: Times of Israel liveblog covers IRGC ship seizures, Oct 7 inquiry developments, Lebanon-Israel talks, and Netanyahu security discussions. Also: Iran Air resumes domestic flights.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: US-Iran ceasefire extended until Iranian officials submit 'unified proposal'
outlets.summary: JPost covers Trump's indefinite ceasefire extension and its implications for Israeli military planning.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Trump extends ceasefire as Iran rejects negotiations under threats, blockade
outlets.summary: Press TV frames Iran as principled, rejecting negotiations 'under the gun.' Pezeshkian: US 'hypocritical rhetoric.' First Hormuz toll revenue deposited. Ship seizures framed as lawful enforcement.

outlets.name: Tehran Times
outlets.headline: Iran rejects pressure as US maritime terrorism casts ominous cloud over diplomacy
outlets.summary: Coverage of Tifani seizure as 'maritime terrorism' and Araghchi's condemnation of US blockade as 'act of war' and ceasefire violation.
